search_query: how to follow up after applying
combined_text: Follow Up All Job Leads: Donât Wait by the Phone (or Computer) Follow Up All Job Leads: Don’t Wait by the Phone (or Computer)by Live Career Staff Writerby Randall S. Hansen, Ph. D. Does this scenario sound familiar? You’re in the market for a new job, and after conducting all your research, you send out 20 cover letters and resumes to potential hiring managers.
